exercises.audioScript: I would like to introduce myself.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I want to introduce myself.
I introduced myself yesterday.
I would like to introduce myself.
I am introducing myself.
exercises.answer: I would like to introduce myself.

exercises.audioScript: Would you like to have some water?
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Do you want water?
Would you like to have some water?
Are you drinking water?
Did you have water?
exercises.answer: Would you like to have some water?

exercises.audioScript: She would not like to work overtime.
exercises.hindiScript: वह overtime काम नहीं करना चाहेगी।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She does not work overtime.
She should not work overtime.
She would not like to work overtime.
She worked overtime.
exercises.answer: She would not like to work overtime.

exercises.audioScript: We would like to offer you this position.
exercises.hindiScript: हम आपको यह position offer करना चाहेंगे।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: We are offering you this position.
We offered you this position.
We will offer you a position later.
We would like to offer you this position.
exercises.answer: We would like to offer you this position.

exercises.audioScript: I'd like to schedule a meeting with you.
exercises.hindiScript: मैं आपके साथ एक meeting schedule करना चाहूँगा।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I'd like to schedule a meeting with you.
I scheduled a meeting with you.
I want to schedule a meeting.
Can we schedule a meeting?
exercises.answer: I'd like to schedule a meeting with you.

exercises.audioScript: Would he like to join the project team?
exercises.hindiScript: क्या वह project team में शामिल होना चाहेगा?
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Did he join the project team?
Would he like to join the project team?
He joined the project team.
Is he joining the project team?
exercises.answer: Would he like to join the project team?

exercises.audioScript: They wouldn't like to cancel the contract.
exercises.hindiScript: वे contract cancel नहीं करना चाहेंगे।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: They cancelled the contract.
They wouldn't like to cancel the contract.
They cannot cancel the contract.
They did not cancel the contract.
exercises.answer: They wouldn't like to cancel the contract.

exercises.audioScript: I would like to apply for this job.
exercises.hindiScript: मैं इस नौकरी के लिए apply करना चाहूँगा।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I applied for this job.
I am applying for a job.
I would like to apply for this job.
I want to apply for every job.
exercises.answer: I would like to apply for this job.

exercises.audioScript: Would you like to see our new product?
exercises.hindiScript: क्या आप हमारी नई product देखना चाहेंगे?
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Do you see our new product?
Did you see our new product?
Would you like to see our new product?
Are you seeing our new product?
exercises.answer: Would you like to see our new product?

exercises.audioScript: He said he would like to meet the director.
exercises.hindiScript: उसने कहा कि वह director से मिलना चाहेगा।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: He met the director.
He said he would like to meet the director.
He wants to meet the director.
He will meet the director.
exercises.answer: He said he would like to meet the director.

exercises.audioScript: I would like to improve my communication skills.
exercises.hindiScript: मैं अपनी communication skills improve करना चाहूँगा।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I improved my communication skills.
I would like to improve my communication skills.
I am improving my skills.
I should improve my skills.
exercises.answer: I would like to improve my communication skills.

exercises.audioScript: Would you like to take a tour of our office?
exercises.hindiScript: क्या आप हमारे office का tour लेना चाहेंगे?
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: You should take a tour of the office.
Did you take a tour of the office?
Would you like to take a tour of our office?
Are you taking a tour of the office?
exercises.answer: Would you like to take a tour of our office?

dictationPassage.text: I would like to introduce myself. My name is Ananya and I would like to apply for this position. I would like to work with a professional team. Would you like to tell me more about this role? I wouldn't like to miss this opportunity.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: मैं अपना परिचय देना चाहूँगी। मेरा नाम Ananya है और मैं इस position के लिए apply करना चाहूँगी। मैं एक professional team के साथ काम करना चाहूँगी। क्या आप मुझे इस role के बारे में और बताना चाहेंगे? मैं इस अवसर को खोना नहीं चाहूँगी।
